title: centaurea attica subsp. attica
intro: Centaurea attica subsp. attica, also known as Attica knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Centaurea attica subsp. attica include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
